attributes.name: label
attributes.description:
An alternate description to use for assistive devices.
If omitted, the icon will be considered presentational and ignored by assistive devices.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description:
Icon name is used to retrieve the icon from a parent Icon Registry.
If no Icon Registry responds to the given name, the fallback svg will be used.

attributes.name: svg
attributes.description: Define the raw SVG string to be displayed by this component.

attributes.name: fallback
attributes.description: Fallback SVG is a raw SVG string, this is used then 'name' hasn't been accepted by any parent Icon Registry.

properties.name: label
properties.description:
An alternate description to use for assistive devices.
If omitted, the icon will be considered presentational and ignored by assistive devices.

properties.name: name
properties.description:
Icon name is used to retrieve the icon from a parent Icon Registry.
If no Icon Registry responds to the given name, the fallback svg will be used.

properties.name: svg
properties.description: Define the raw SVG string to be displayed by this component.

properties.name: fallback
properties.description: Fallback SVG is a raw SVG string, this is used then 'name' hasn't been accepted by any parent Icon Registry.

events.name: icon_request
events.description: fires when the name property is defined to retrieve the icon source.

cssProperties.name: --uui-icon-color
cssProperties.description: sets the color for the icon, if not set it will use the text color.

cssProperties.name: --uui-icon-color-overwrite
cssProperties.description: overwrite the icon color, once this is set the --uui-icon-color will be ignored.
